description.content: Operations for retrieving, searching, and managing questions across the Stack Exchange network.
Returns the questions on a Stack Exchange site. Results are sorted by activity by default. Requires the site parameter to specify which Stack Exchange site to query.

query.description: (Required) The Stack Exchange site to query. Use the API name of the site, e.g., stackoverflow, serverfault, superuser.
The page number to return (1-indexed)
Number of results to return per page (max 100)
Unix timestamp for the minimum creation date
Unix timestamp for the maximum creation date
Sort order for results
The field to sort results by (varies by endpoint)
A filter to control which fields are returned in the response. Use the /filter endpoint to create custom filters.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Operations for retrieving and managing tags used to categorize questions.
Returns the tags on a Stack Exchange site. Tags are used to categorize questions and help users find relevant content.

query.description: (Required) The Stack Exchange site to query. Use the API name of the site, e.g., stackoverflow, serverfault, superuser.
The page number to return (1-indexed)
Number of results to return per page (max 100)
Unix timestamp for the minimum creation date
Unix timestamp for the maximum creation date
Sort order for results
The field to sort results by (varies by endpoint)
Filter tags whose name contains this string
A filter to control which fields are returned in the response. Use the /filter endpoint to create custom filters.

description.content: Operations for retrieving badge definitions and badge awards on Stack Exchange sites.
Returns all badges in the system. Badges are awarded to users for performing actions or achieving goals on a Stack Exchange site.

Operations for searching questions and content across the Stack Exchange network.
Searches for questions based on a query string. Returns questions that match the search terms in the title, body, or tags. At least one of tagged, nottagged, or intitle must be specified.

Number of results to return per page (max 100)

The field to sort results by (varies by endpoint)

Operations for retrieving information about Stack Exchange network sites.
Returns all Stack Exchange network sites. This includes main sites, meta sites, and sites in various stages of development.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

The Stack Exchange API v2.3 provides programmatic access to the Stack Exchange network of Q&A sites, including Stack Overflow, Server Fault, Super User, and hundreds of other communities. The API supports reading and writing questions, answers, comments, tags, users, and other content. Authentication is via OAuth 2.0 with access tokens. All responses are JSON-encoded and support GZIP compression.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stack Exchange API Support
 Email: team+api@stackexchange.com
